case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. SHERMAN URRUTIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT URRUTIA, SHERMAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-31-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT URRUTIA, SHERMAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URRUTIA, SHERMAN $2,505.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,505.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT URRUTIA, SHERMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
